curatorNote:
Beeple's TIME: The Future of Business captured a distinct cultural moment: a digital-native artist collaborating with a legacy magazine to reflect on a world in acceleration. Created in Cinema 4D and OctaneRender, the composition embeds Beeple's own design interface into the work, collapsing process and product into one image.

Hivemind holds the 1/1 NFT of the TIME cover, among the most-cited works of Beeple's SuperRare practice.
